## Meeting Purpose

[Explore potential partnership between GrowthX.ai and Udemy for content creation and organic growth strategies.](https://fathom.video/share/71sXob73xWr8Uge4EEc7L7Nb7gstJQRQ?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX.ai has developed AI-powered workflows for efficient, high-quality content creation at scale](https://fathom.video/share/71sXob73xWr8Uge4EEc7L7Nb7gstJQRQ?tab=summary&timestamp=373.0)
  - [Udemy seeks to improve organic channels, top-of-funnel content, and micro-learning experiences](https://fathom.video/share/71sXob73xWr8Uge4EEc7L7Nb7gstJQRQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1146.0)
  - [Both parties expressed strong interest in collaboration, focusing on leveraging Udemy's course data](https://fathom.video/share/71sXob73xWr8Uge4EEc7L7Nb7gstJQRQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1519.0)
  - [Next steps include a follow-up meeting to discuss specific project ideas before May 6th](https://fathom.video/share/71sXob73xWr8Uge4EEc7L7Nb7gstJQRQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1800.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX.ai's Content Creation System

  - [AI-powered workflows and coding agents for content strategy and production](https://fathom.video/share/71sXob73xWr8Uge4EEc7L7Nb7gstJQRQ?tab=summary&timestamp=373.0)
  - [Highly adaptable processes with expert interventions throughout](https://fathom.video/share/71sXob73xWr8Uge4EEc7L7Nb7gstJQRQ?tab=summary&timestamp=461.0)
  - [Managing directors from top companies (e.g., G2.com, TripAdvisor, TechCrunch)](https://fathom.video/share/71sXob73xWr8Uge4EEc7L7Nb7gstJQRQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1021.0)
  - [Cost-effective: aiming for $0.10 per word, publishing 50-100k words/month](https://fathom.video/share/71sXob73xWr8Uge4EEc7L7Nb7gstJQRQ?tab=summary&timestamp=988.0)

### Udemy's Current Challenges and Goals

  - [Heavy reliance on paid channels; need to build up organic channels](https://fathom.video/share/71sXob73xWr8Uge4EEc7L7Nb7gstJQRQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1146.0)
  - [Desire for more top-of-funnel, informational content](https://fathom.video/share/71sXob73xWr8Uge4EEc7L7Nb7gstJQRQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1146.0)
  - [Interest in creating micro-learning content and editorial points of view](https://fathom.video/share/71sXob73xWr8Uge4EEc7L7Nb7gstJQRQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1185.0)
  - [Goal: increase app engagement and course purchases through relevant, bite-sized content](https://fathom.video/share/71sXob73xWr8Uge4EEc7L7Nb7gstJQRQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1234.0)

### Potential Collaboration Areas

  - [Repurposing Udemy's course transcripts and instructor content](https://fathom.video/share/71sXob73xWr8Uge4EEc7L7Nb7gstJQRQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1638.0)
  - [Creating AI-powered newsletters or distinct projects](https://fathom.video/share/71sXob73xWr8Uge4EEc7L7Nb7gstJQRQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1602.0)
  - [Developing discovery mechanisms for Udemy's vast knowledge base](https://fathom.video/share/71sXob73xWr8Uge4EEc7L7Nb7gstJQRQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)
  - [Producing hooks for time-poor learners and next-generation learning styles](https://fathom.video/share/71sXob73xWr8Uge4EEc7L7Nb7gstJQRQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1745.0)

### Data and AI Considerations

  - [Udemy has transcribed 98% of courses with instructor opt-in for Gen AI policy](https://fathom.video/share/71sXob73xWr8Uge4EEc7L7Nb7gstJQRQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1547.0)
  - [Potential use of vector databases for efficient content retrieval and repurposing](https://fathom.video/share/71sXob73xWr8Uge4EEc7L7Nb7gstJQRQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)
  - [Importance of maintaining content accuracy and avoiding AI hallucinations](https://fathom.video/share/71sXob73xWr8Uge4EEc7L7Nb7gstJQRQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1693.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Alison (Udemy PMM) to coordinate a follow-up meeting before May 6th](https://fathom.video/share/71sXob73xWr8Uge4EEc7L7Nb7gstJQRQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1801.0)
  - [Marcel to regroup with GrowthX team and prepare initial project ideas](https://fathom.video/share/71sXob73xWr8Uge4EEc7L7Nb7gstJQRQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1807.0)
  - [Schedule in-person meeting after May 14th to further discuss collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/71sXob73xWr8Uge4EEc7L7Nb7gstJQRQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1869.0)
  - [Explore specific use cases leveraging Udemy's course data and transcripts](https://fathom.video/share/71sXob73xWr8Uge4EEc7L7Nb7gstJQRQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1911.0)
